comments.post_body:
Thrilled to share an important milestone in my PhD journey!
I successfully completed my PhD Defense!

It’s difficult to put into words what this journey has meant to me as years of challenges, growth, late nights, and continuous learning. This milestone is not just a personal achievement, but a reflection of the support, guidance, and collaboration I’ve been fortunate to receive throughout the process.

My deepest gratitude goes to my supervisor, Prof. Neeraj Goyal, for his constant support, patience, and belief in me. His guidance has shaped my research journey in more ways than I can express.

A sincere thanks to my DSC members Prof. V. N. A. Naikan, Prof. R. N. Rai, and Prof. Sudipta Mahapatra for their thoughtful feedback, questions, and encouragement throughout my PhD. Your insights have significantly strengthened my work.

I would also like to thank my external examiners, Prof. Mukesh Kumar Barua and Prof. Liudong Xing, for their valuable reviews, comments, and suggestions. Your inputs added great depth and clarity to my thesis and the defense discussion.

To all members of the Subir Chowdhury School of Quality and Reliability, IIT Kharagpur, thank you for the discussions, technical help, motivation, and most importantly, the camaraderie. This journey would have been much harder without your continuous support.

To my friends, colleagues, and family thank you for standing by me through every high and low. This PhD journey was never a solo effort, and I’m genuinely grateful to be surrounded by such supportive people. 

Excited for the next chapter ahead!
I am open to opportunities in industrial reliability roles as well as academic research positions.

#PhD #DefenceCompleted #ReliabilityEngineering #IITKharagpur #NetworkReliability
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on completing their PhD defense in Reliability Engineering at IIT Kharagpur, and is likely responding to the author's expression of gratitude and excitement for their next chapter. The commenter is acknowledging the author's achievement and the support system that helped them reach this milestone.

comments.post_body:
Thrilled to share that I’ve rejoined PhonePe

After an enriching 1.5-year journey with Swiggy, I’m excited to return to PhonePe  — a place where I previously spent over 3.5 years contributing to India’s digital payments revolution.

Joining back feels like coming home — with fresh perspectives, deeper learnings, and a stronger resolve to drive financial digitalization at scale.

A big thank you to all the mentors, peers, and leaders who’ve been part of my journey so far. Your guidance and belief have been instrumental, and I carry those lessons forward with gratitude.

Because truly — once a PhonePe-r, always a PhonePe-r.
Here’s to new beginnings, familiar values, and creating impact once again!

#PhonePe #DigitalIndia #NewBeginnings #Fintech #Gratitude #MentorshipMatters #OnceAPhonePerAlwaysAPhonePer
comments.context_summary: The commenter is congratulating the author on rejoining PhonePe, a company they previously worked at for over 3.5 years, after a 1.5-year stint at Swiggy. The author is excited to return to PhonePe and drive financial digitalization at scale, feeling like they're coming home with fresh perspectives and deeper learnings.

comments.post_body:
I’m excited to share that I’ve joined Google as a Technical Program Manager!

Google becomes the second company in my career journey, and this step means a lot to me - a mix of gratitude, curiosity, and a strong desire to learn and contribute.

A heartfelt thank you to GR Yoganandhan and Dhrishti Ballani for making the recruitment process smooth and thoughtful. Your support made a real difference.

What makes this moment special isn’t just the brand or the title, but the opportunity to solve meaningful problems, collaborate with brilliant minds, and continue growing in ways I’ve always hoped for.

Here’s to new beginnings, steady learning, and doing work that matters. 🙌

#NewRole #Google #TechnicalProgramManager #Grateful #CareerGrowth #NewBeginnings
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about someone joining Google as a Technical Program Manager, where they express gratitude and excitement for the new opportunity to learn and contribute. The commenter is likely offering congratulations or support for this new career development.

comments.post_body:
We are delighted to share that Dr. Arvind Tripathy - MBA, Ph.D. (Management), FDP (IIM Ahmedabad) has joined as the Dean of KIIT School of Management (KSOM), Bhubaneswar.

Prof. Arvind Tripathy is associated with School of Management since 2008. He has 25 years of experience consisting of 7 years of corporate experience and 18 years in academics. He was associated with the advertising industry in Mumbai and Bangalore and media services in IT training Kolkata. A Ph.D. in Management in the marketing area, he is an alumnus of the Department of Business Administration, Utkal University. He is an alumnus of IIM Ahmedabad (FDP program 2013).

Apart from his teaching assignments, he is actively involved in MDPs in organizations like SIDBI, IDBI Bank, Utkalika, OFSDP, Mahanadi Coal Fields and in-house training programs of All India Radio & Doordarshan. He has been a resource person/trainer in various marketing workshops of national and international fame - ‘Enhancing the capacity of middle and small scale enterprises in Orissa Regional Chapter’ was a European Union- Govt. of India project. 

He has served as a marketing consultant for ‘Capacity Enhancing’ program for the craftsman and handicrafts trading societies from Orissa organized by Trade Kraft UK and IRFT Mumbai. 

He is also involved in projects from Indian Council of Social Science Research, New Delhi (Ministry of MHRD, Govt. of India) in social sector as  Co-Project Investigator.

#ksombbsr #kiit #Bhubaneswar
comments.context_summary: Dr. Arvind Tripathy has joined as the Dean of KIIT School of Management, bringing 25 years of experience in corporate and academic fields, and the commenter is responding to the announcement of his appointment. His background includes teaching, research, and consulting in marketing and management, with associations with various prestigious institutions and organizations.
